case_title: MICHAEL R. JOHNSON VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "GRANTED".

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,310.77 FILED BY JOHNSON, MICHAEL R. AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-19-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
